commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds OpenRouter-specific request header forwarding so resolved API-key credentials are sent as explicit bearer auth headers on verified OpenRouter stream routes.

PR surface: Source +39, Tests +96. Total +135 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence before-fix reproduction was run in this read-only pass. The linked issue gives concrete release-to-release steps and the PR body provides live after-fix OpenRouter probe proof, so the path is source/report-reproducible with medium confidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A tiny repair to the new test mock typing should unblock the otherwise focused OpenRouter fix candidate.

target.title: fix(openrouter): send explicit auth headers
target.author: sunlit-deng

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
